title: amaryllis × rubescens
intro: Amaryllis × rubescens, also known as the Fire Lily, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its vibrant red to orange flowers and strap-like leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. Amaryllis × rubescens is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and leaves are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
